description: After asbestos abatement work, a safety officer must ensure an independent air quality test is performed and passed before allowing other workers into the area.

nodes.task_description: Schedule a third-party industrial hygienist to perform air monitoring in the containment area.

expected_outcome.value: An appointment with a testing agency is scheduled.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the air test results from the hygienist.
Verify that the results are below the permissible exposure limit and formally clear the area for re-entry.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the area is safe and updates the site status.
